title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2022

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/09/2022
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 1.46%. the main contract I2301 closed 710.5. some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills tended tobe wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
